title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Blue Star India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Blue Star India
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
